title: Fuel for teachers engaged in paper marking
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); The Ministry of Education said that the evaluation of the G.C.E. Ordinary Level Examination will be conducted without any hindrance.
The Minister of Education Susil Premajayantha said that he has scheduled a program to provide fuel to the teachers who will be participating in the G.C.E Ordinary Level Examination paper marking.

The Minister further said that the teachers will be provided with the appointment letter, duty identity card, and letter issued by the Commissioner General of Examinations to purchase fuel between 6.00 AM and 7.00 AM and from 5.00 PM to 6.00 PM.
